ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., Paperback, Hardcover, eBook) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* File path to the cover image of the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the book record was last updated */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "reprint_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the book has been reprinted */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Page count of the book */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the book (useful for shipping) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the book is currently active */,
  "publisher_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the publisher */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was last updated */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the author */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Death year of the author (if applicable) */,
  "is_alive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is still alive */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the publisher record was last updated */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was established */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publisher is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category record was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., Warehouse A, Store B) */,
  "last_stocked" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last stocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for reordering */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the book is out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the book was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale record was last updated */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale (including discounts) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the company's newsletter */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
